overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through a lush natural landscape toward a waterfall, then continuing along a forested hillside path. The scene features detailed vegetation, rocky terrain, and wildlife including horses near the waterfall base.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the distant waterfall

entered.detail: tall waterfall cascading down rocky cliff face in the distance
steep rock formation surrounding the waterfall
small trees and shrubs dotting the landscape
tall green grass covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassy valley with scattered trees, approaching a large waterfall visible in the distance against rocky cliffs. The overcast sky provides diffused lighting across the lush green landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall base with mist and wildlife

events.description: two horses come into view grazing near the waterfall base

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfall base while observing the horses nearby

notable_agents.action: white horse grazing on grass near the waterfall mist
brown horse standing near rocky outcrop

entered.detail: white horse grazing near the waterfall
uneven rocky terrain with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the base of the waterfall where mist rises from the cascading water. Two horses graze peacefully near the rocky pool area as the character continues walking forward through the uneven terrain.

events.description: character turns left away from the waterfall to follow cliffside path
waterfall exits view as expansive forest valley opens up on the left

agents.ego_description: turning left away from the waterfall and walking along the cliff edge

entered.detail: expansive view of forested valley and distant river
thick trees covering the hillside below

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a narrow cliffside path, leaving the waterfall behind. The view opens to reveal a vast forested valley on the left while the rocky cliff face remains on the right.

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through dense forest along a narrow grassy trail

entered.detail: large moss-covered rocks alongside the path
dense tree cover blocking most of the sky

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending a narrow trail through dense forest, with large boulders scattered along the path. The valley view is now obscured by thick vegetation and trees as the path winds uphill.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, overcast valley toward a towering waterfall and then upward into a dense forest. It begins with the character walking through a lush grassy expanse toward distant rocky cliffs under a diffused sky. As the character reaches the base of the waterfall, the scene fills with rising mist and grazing horses before the path turns left away from the cascading water. The view then expands to reveal a vast forested valley as the camera follows the character along a narrow cliffside trail. Finally, the open vista is obscured by thick vegetation and large boulders as the path winds steeply uphill into a dense woodland.
